meta.note: GM mode uses genMarket(gm_under) with ACTIVE_MARKET patched to --market. Campaign career start uses CAREER_ENTRY_MARKET_ID / ladder tier 0 from campaignMode.js (Wichita), overriding the patched constant when beginCareer runs.

wichitaEconTest.description: Headless Tier 0 (Wichita) campaign only: each period applies a fixed spending profile to player station(s), then advTurn(). Stops after first assignment end for tier 0 or cash bankruptcy / GM fire.

conservative.label: Conservative
conservative.intent: Cost control first: lower programming + marketing as a fraction of trailing revenue, stabilize before growing.
conservative.behavior: Each period sets ops.progBudget / ops.promo from ~2.6% / ~1.3% of station revenue (capped by era caps), then calcRev.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.intent: Competent default GM: moderate discretionary spend — some growth, some discipline.
balanced.behavior: Targets ~6.2% / ~3.7% of trailing revenue for programming / promo (capped), then calcRev — no austerity cliff, no all-in gamble.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.intent: Push share/revenue harder: higher programming and marketing commitment; accepts more short-term risk.
aggressive.behavior: Targets ~10.5% / ~6.2% of trailing revenue for programming / promo (capped), then calcRev — still bounded by caps, not random.

wichitaEconTest.distressDefinition: Serious distress if any of: period cash ≤ -$35k; portfolio EBITDA ≤ -$130k; cash ≤ -$12k while EBITDA ≤ -$90k; ≥6 consecutive negative-EBITDA periods.

plainEnglish: Balanced profile: promotion 6.7%, profitable at contract end 0.0%, serious distress 100.0%, bankruptcy 0.0%.
Balanced runs usually avoid bankruptcy, but many still trip the distress heuristic (tight cash or deep loss periods) — stressful, not necessarily unwinnable.
Few balanced runs finish the Tier 0 contract with positive EBITDA — margin recovery may be too rare without stronger play than these heuristics.
Promotion rates look low even for balanced play — advancement may feel luck-heavy relative to “competent default GM.”
Outcomes are broadly similar across profiles — Wichita is not a one-strategy puzzle in this harness.
Overall: Wichita looks structurally too punishing for a Tier 0 fantasy — balanced play struggles to finish solvent or promoted.

definitions.SHARP_DROP_NEAR_ZERO_CASH: Single-period cash fell sharply (e.g. large negative delta) while prior cash was not deeply negative.
definitions.SPEND_DRIVEN_COLLAPSE: Discretionary spend ratio (promo+prog)/revenue jumped in the last periods vs earlier baseline, with deep negative EBITDA.
definitions.LOW_STARTING_RUNWAY: Bankruptcy very early (≤6 advTurns) with low opening cash and multiple early periods of materially negative EBITDA.
definitions.STEADY_OPERATING_BURN: Most of the last several periods show negative EBITDA (median EBITDA in the red) without a spend spike pattern.
definitions.FORCED_DISTRESS_SEQUENCE: Multiple snapshots show debtWarningQ ≥ 2 (solo distress countdown before forced sale / bankruptcy exit).
definitions.UNKNOWN: Heuristic did not match; inspect trajectoryTail and bankruptcy.atFlip in JSON.

interpretation: Across profiles, the dominant pattern is sustained negative economics / distress sequencing — recurring operating burn or the solo distress→forced-exit path dominates over one-off spikes.

definitions.PROMOTED: Assignment-end classification was promoted (final confidence ≥ successThreshold).
definitions.BANKRUPT_BEFORE_END: Run ended in _soloBankrupt before Tier 0 assignment resolution.
definitions.FIRED_BEFORE_END: GM fired before Tier 0 assignment resolution.
definitions.STALLED_RUN: Hit advTurn cap without assignment end, bankruptcy, or fire.
definitions.NO_ASSIGNMENT_END_PAYLOAD: Loop exited without observing a Tier 0 assignment-end payload.
definitions.EARLY_CONFIDENCE_COLLAPSE: Heuristic: first formal review was bad and confidenceAfter ≤ 42.
definitions.BAD_REVIEW_DOMINATED: Heuristic: ≥ half of formal reviews in the bad composite band.
definitions.MEDIOCRE_PLATEAU: Heuristic: every formal review was mediocre (no good / no bad).
definitions.LOW_PROFITABILITY_DRAG: Heuristic: last-review trailing marginAvg < -8 (deep loss vs targets).
definitions.PROFILE_SPEND_TOO_WEAK: Heuristic (conservative profile only): very low discretionary ratio at last review yet margin still negative.
definitions.BELOW_SURVIVAL_THRESHOLD: Default bucket for demotion: final confidence below survivalThreshold (see assignmentResolution vs ladder).
definitions.UNKNOWN: Did not match simple heuristics — inspect formalReviews in outcomeDiagnostics.byProfile.

outcomeDiagnostics.tier0ThresholdsNote: successThreshold / survivalThreshold on each run come from the assignment-end payload when present; failureThreshold and contractLengthPeriods come from wlCampaign.LADDER[0] at career start.
